articles.title: Waltham police searching for girl, 17, missing since July 3
articles.description:
Victoria "Tori" Amore, 17, was last seen on leaving her home in Waltham on Friday, July 3, the Waltham Police Department said.

The post Waltham police searching for girl, 17, missing since July 3 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Waltham police are searching for 17-year-old Victoria 'Tori' Amore, missing since July 3.
Tori was last seen leaving her home in Waltham on Friday, July 3.
Community members are urged to assist in locating Tori to ensure her safe return.
